subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested and revealed the Tablet and the Pen, and hath taught man that which he knew not. Verily, He is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ظهر و اظهر اللوح و القلم و علم الانسان ما لم یعلم انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
